title: polygala alpestris
intro: Polygala alpestris, also known as Alpine Milkwort, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Polygalaceae family, native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Polygala alpestris include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and improving respiratory function, making it a valuable herb for those suffering from respiratory ailments. Herbal preparations of Polygala alpestris include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, with the most common being respiratory issues.
